log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Verdan — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Verdan — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Verdan — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Verdan — Iron Concentration HP: 51/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Verdan — Iron Concentration HP: 26/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Verdan — Iron Concentration --- HP: 26/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.

→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):15+8=23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
